title: Profit Centre Head / Branch Head
responsibilities:
Key Responsibilities

Profit Centre Management

Own complete branch / profit centre P&L responsibility
Drive revenue growth and profitability targets
Manage budgeting, forecasting, cost control, and financial performance
Improve branch productivity and utilization metrics
Operations Management

Handle day-to-day fleet / branch operations smoothly
Ensure high vehicle utilization, SLA adherence, and service quality
Manage vendors, drivers, fleet maintenance, and operational processes
Implement operational controls and continuous improvements
Knowledge Sales & Business Development

Build strong relationships with key customers and strategic accounts
Drive B2B sales, renewals, upselling, and retention
Identify new market opportunities and local partnerships
Team Leadership

Lead, mentor, and manage operations + sales teams
Set KPIs, monitor performance, and improve team productivity
Build a customer-first and performance-driven culture
skills: 8+ years of experience in Car Rental / Fleet Management / Mobility industry
Strong experience in Operations Management + Sales / Business Development
Proven track record in P&L ownership and profitability management
Experience handling corporate clients / B2B accounts
Strong leadership and team management experience
Good commercial acumen and negotiation skills
Ability to work in a fast-paced target-driven environment
recruiter_notes: something like passanger management , not from goods or rapido or uber
